ConnectionStrings._Comment_LKvitaiDb: Set via env var ConnectionStrings__LKvitaiDb or `dotnet user-secrets set ConnectionStrings:LKvitaiDb '...'`. Never commit a real value here.

Sales._Comment_OrdersDataSource: Default Sql adapter requires ConnectionStrings:LKvitaiDb. Set 'Stub' explicitly only when you knowingly want sample data.

Sql._Comment_OrdersQueryMode: 'Snapshot' (default) caches dbo.weblb_Orders in-process and pages in C#. 'Paged' calls dbo.weblb_Orders_Paged for every list request — only safe once that SP is deployed (see .scratch/sp-paged.sql).
